zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume III Talvas於大約1088年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c時，他的父親Robert II de Bellême37歲，母親Agnes de Ponthieu25歲。他於大約1112年與Hélène de Bourgogne在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1119年移民到英國。他去世於1171年6月30日在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c享年84歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume III Talvas于大约1088年出生在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c时，他的父亲Robert II de Bellême37岁，母亲Agnes de Ponthieu25岁。他于大约1112年与Hélène de Bourgogne在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1119年移民到英国。他去世于1171年6月30日在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c享年84岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c。

nameMeanings.name: Talvas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Andre, Emile, Armand, Patrice, Raoul, Yves.

variants.name: Salva
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Marina, Alfonso, Blanca, Carlos, Fernando, Gustavo, Jaime, Jose, Juan, Juana, Julio.
Catalan (Salvà): from the personal name Salvà, Catalan form of Latin Silvanus (a derivative of silva ‘wood’).
Italian (northern): from a short form of the personal name   Salvato  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume III Talvas was born about 1088, in Alençon, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Robert II de Bellême, was 37 and his mother, Agnes de Ponthieu, was 25. He married Hélène de Bourgogne about 1112, in Alençon, Orne, Lower Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He immigrated to England in 1119. He died on 30 June 1171, in Alençon, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 84, and was buried in Alençon, Orne, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume III Talvas est né environ 1088, à Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Robert II de Bellême, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Ponthieu, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hélène de Bourgogne environ 1112, à Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il a immigré au Angleterre en 1119. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1171, à Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume III Talvas um 1088 in Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert II de Bellême 37 und seine Mutter Agnes de Ponthieu 25. Er hat um 1112 in Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich Hélène de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er ist 1119 nach England eingewandert. Er starb am 30. Juni 1171 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume III Talvas è nato il circa 1088 nel Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert II de Bellême, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Ponthieu, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Hélène de Bourgogne circa 1112, nel Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrato nel England nel 1119. Morì il 30 giugno 1171, nel Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume III Talvasが約1088年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアレンcオンで生まれた時，父Robert II de Bellêmeは37歳，母Agnes de Ponthieuは25歳であった。約1112年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアレンcオンでHélène de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1119年にイギリスに移住した。彼は1171年6月30日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアレンcオンで84歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアレンcオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume III Talvas(이)가 대략 1088년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 알렌c에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II de Bellême(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Ponthieu(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1112년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 알렌c에서 Hélène de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1119년에 영국로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1171년 6월 30일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 알렌c에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 알렌c에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume III Talvas nasceu aproximadamente 1088, em Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert II de Bellême, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Ponthieu, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hélène de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1112, em Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Inglaterra em 1119. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1171, em Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume III Talvas родился около 1088 г. в местности аленcон, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert II de Bellême было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Ponthieu, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hélène de Bourgogne около 1112 г. в местности аленcон, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в Англия в 1119 году. Он умер 30 июня 1171 г. в местности аленcон, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности аленcон, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция.

Se casó con Hélène de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1112, en Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Inmigró a Inglaterra en 1119. Murió el 30 de junio de 1171, en Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
